videos.headline: Ty Simpson finds Ryan Williams for 75-yard TD
videos.description: Alabama's Ty Simpson dumps one off to Ryan Williams who takes it 75 yards for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson finds Ryan Williams for 75-yard TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin Badgers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights
videos.description: Wisconsin Badgers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin Badgers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama's Bray Hubbard with an interception vs. Wisconsin
videos.description: Bray Hubbard jumps the route and makes an interception to give the ball back to Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama's Bray Hubbard with an interception vs. Wisconsin) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Germie Bernard finds the end zone for Alabama
videos.description: Germie Bernard takes the handoff and dives into the end zone for an Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Germie Bernard finds the end zone for Alabama) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson connects with Germie Bernard for TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson airs one out and finds Germie Bernard for the 43-yard Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson connects with Germie Bernard for TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson finds Isaiah Horton for 13-yard Alabama TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson caps off an impressive drive with a 13-yard TD pass to Isaiah Horton.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson finds Isaiah Horton for 13-yard Alabama TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Vinny Anthony II with a 95-yard kickoff return TD for Wisconsin
videos.description: Vinny Anthony II gets Wisconsin on the board by taking the kickoff 95 yards to the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vinny Anthony II with a 95-yard kickoff return TD for Wisconsin) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: House call! Vinny Anthony scores on 95-yard kick return
videos.description: Vinny Anthony takes kickoff 95-yard for kickoff return touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (House call! Vinny Anthony scores on 95-yard kick return) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams breaks ankles for 41-yard Alabama TD
videos.description: Alabama's Ty Simpson airs one out for a 41-yard TD pass to Ryan Williams.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams breaks ankles for 41-yard Alabama TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin responds to Bama's 75-yard TD with 95-yard kickoff return
videos.description: Alabama and Wisconsin score touchdowns just 12 seconds apart to make it a 35-7 game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin responds to Bama's 75-yard TD with 95-yard kickoff return) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bray Hubbard snags 2nd INT of the game for Alabama
videos.description: Bray Hubbard having himself a day on defense with his second interception of the game vs. Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bray Hubbard snags 2nd INT of the game for Alabama) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: DeBoer, Simpson describe No. 19 Tide's reenergized squad
videos.description: After Kalen DeBoer improves to 9-0 at home as Alabama's head coach, he and Ty Simpson discuss their winning display against Wisconsin and what lies ahead for the Tide.
